data.title: This Bullish Analyst Highlights Taiwan Semi's 3nm Strength and Margin Expansion Potential, Raises Forecast
data.description: Needham analyst maintains Buy rating for Taiwan Semiconductor with increased price target following upbeat quarterly report and Apple's potential impact on 3nm performance.

data.title: What's Going On With ASML Shares Friday?
data.description: ASML stock is moving higher on Friday. The stock might be rebounding after falling earlier this week on soft guidance which it issued on Tuesday.

data.title: NuScale Rockets Higher On Amazon Deal: How High Can It Go?
data.description: Amazon's (NASDAQ: AMZN) latest foray into nuclear energy shows the technology has reached a critical mass. Long known to be a critical component of carbon reduction goals, costs, time constraints, and safety were barriers.
